(module fizzbuzz
  (fn main -> int
    (set n int (string_to_int (array_get (argv) 0)))
    (for i 1 (add n 1)
      (cond
        ((eq (mod i 15) 0) (println "FizzBuzz"))
        ((eq (mod i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
        ((eq (mod i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
        (true (println i))))
    (ret 0)))

(module reverse_words
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set sentence string (array_get args 0))
    (set words array (string_split sentence " "))
    (set len int (array_length words))
    (set result string "")
    (for i 0 len
      (set idx int (sub (sub len 1) i))
      (set word string (array_get words idx))
      (if (gt i 0)
        (set result (string_concat result " ")))
      (set result (string_concat result word)))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

(module two_sum

(fn main -> int
  (set target int (string_to_int (array_get (argv) 0)))
  (set parts array (string_split (array_get (argv) 1) " "))
  (set nums array (array_new))
  (set len int (array_length parts))
  (for i 0 len
    (array_push nums (string_to_int (array_get parts i))))
  (for i 0 len
    (for j (add i 1) len
      (if (eq (add (array_get nums i) (array_get nums j)) target)
        (println (string_format "{} {}" i j))
        (ret 0))))
  (println -1)
  (ret 0))

)

(module word_freq
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set text string (string_to_lower (array_get args 0)))
    (set words array (string_split text " "))
    (set freq map (map_new))
    (set len int (array_length words))
    (for i 0 len
      (set w string (array_get words i))
      (if (gt (string_length w) 0)
        (if (map_has freq w)
          (map_set freq w (add (map_get freq w) 1))
          (else
            (map_set freq w 1)))))
    (set keys array (map_keys freq))
    (array_sort keys)
    (set klen int (array_length keys))
    (for j 0 klen
      (set k string (array_get keys j))
      (println (string_format "{} {}" k (map_get freq k))))
    (ret 0)))

(module bracket_checker

(fn main -> int
  (set input string (array_get (argv) 0))
  (set stack array (array_new))
  (set len int (string_length input))
  (set valid bool true)
  (for i 0 len
    (set ch int (string_get input i))
    (cond
      ((or (eq ch 40) (or (eq ch 91) (eq ch 123)))
        (array_push stack ch))
      ((eq ch 41)
        (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
          (set valid false)
        (else
          (set top int (array_pop stack))
          (if (not (eq top 40))
            (set valid false)))))
      ((eq ch 93)
        (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
          (set valid false)
        (else
          (set top int (array_pop stack))
          (if (not (eq top 91))
            (set valid false)))))
      ((eq ch 125)
        (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
          (set valid false)
        (else
          (set top int (array_pop stack))
          (if (not (eq top 123))
            (set valid false)))))))
  (if (and valid (eq (array_length stack) 0))
    (println "true")
  (else
    (println "false")))
  (ret 0))

)

(module rle
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set s string (array_get args 0))
    (set len int (string_length s))
    (if (eq len 0)
      (println "")
      (ret 0))
    (set result string "")
    (set current int (string_get s 0))
    (set count int 1)
    (for i 1 len
      (set ch int (string_get s i))
      (if (eq ch current)
        (set count (add count 1))
        (else
          (set result (string_concat result (string_concat (char_from_code current) (string_from_int count))))
          (set current ch)
          (set count 1))))
    (set result (string_concat result (string_concat (char_from_code current) (string_from_int count))))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

(module query_parse

(fn split_pairs s string delim string -> array
  (set parts array (string_split s delim))
  (ret parts))

(fn parse_pair pair string -> array
  (set idx int (string_find pair "="))
  (if (eq idx (neg 1))
    (ret [pair ""]))
  (set k string (string_slice pair 0 idx))
  (set vstart int (add idx 1))
  (set vlen int (sub (string_length pair) vstart))
  (set v string (string_slice pair vstart vlen))
  (ret [k v]))

(fn sort_pairs pairs array -> array
  (set n int (array_length pairs))
  (for i 0 n
    (for j 0 (sub n 1)
      (set a array (array_get pairs j))
      (set b array (array_get pairs (add j 1)))
      (set ka string (array_get a 0))
      (set kb string (array_get b 0))
      (if (gt ka kb)
        (set pairs (array_set pairs j b))
        (set pairs (array_set pairs (add j 1) a)))))
  (ret pairs))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
    (ret 0))
  (set qs string (array_get args 0))
  (if (eq (string_length qs) 0)
    (ret 0))
  (set raw_pairs array (split_pairs qs "&"))
  (set parsed array (array_new))
  (for-each p string raw_pairs
    (if (gt (string_length p) 0)
      (set parsed (array_push parsed (parse_pair p)))))
  (set sorted array (sort_pairs parsed))
  (for-each entry array sorted
    (set k string (array_get entry 0))
    (set v string (array_get entry 1))
    (println (string_format "{}={}" k v)))
  (ret 0))

)

(module query_parse

(fn str_lt a string b string -> bool
  (set la int (string_length a))
  (set lb int (string_length b))
  (set mn int la)
  (if (lt lb la)
    (set mn lb))
  (for i 0 mn
    (set ca int (string_get a i))
    (set cb int (string_get b i))
    (if (lt ca cb)
      (ret true))
    (if (lt cb ca)
      (ret false)))
  (ret (lt la lb)))

(fn parse_key pair string -> string
  (set idx int (string_find pair "="))
  (if (lt idx 0)
    (ret pair))
  (ret (string_slice pair 0 idx)))

(fn parse_val pair string -> string
  (set idx int (string_find pair "="))
  (if (lt idx 0)
    (ret ""))
  (set vstart int (add idx 1))
  (set vlen int (sub (string_length pair) vstart))
  (ret (string_slice pair vstart vlen)))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
    (ret 0))
  (set qs string (array_get args 0))
  (if (eq (string_length qs) 0)
    (ret 0))
  (set raw array (string_split qs "&"))
  (set keys array (array_new))
  (set vals array (array_new))
  (for-each p string raw
    (if (ne (string_length p) 0)
      (set keys (array_push keys (parse_key p)))
      (set vals (array_push vals (parse_val p)))))
  (set n int (array_length keys))
  (for i 0 n
    (for j 0 (sub n 1)
      (set ka string (array_get keys j))
      (set kb string (array_get keys (add j 1)))
      (if (str_lt kb ka)
        (set va string (array_get vals j))
        (set vb string (array_get vals (add j 1)))
        (set keys (array_set keys j kb))
        (set keys (array_set keys (add j 1) ka))
        (set vals (array_set vals j vb))
        (set vals (array_set vals (add j 1) va)))))
  (for i 0 n
    (set k string (array_get keys i))
    (set v string (array_get vals i))
    (println (string_format "{}={}" k v)))
  (ret 0))

)

(module rpn
  (fn main -> int
    (set expr string (array_get (argv) 0))
    (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set i int 0)
    (set len int (array_length tokens))
    (while (lt i len)
      (set tok string (array_get tokens i))
      (cond
        ((eq tok "+")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (add a b)))
        ((eq tok "-")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (sub a b)))
        ((eq tok "*")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (mul a b)))
        ((eq tok "/")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (div a b)))
        (true
          (array_push stack (string_to_int tok))))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (println (array_get stack 0))
    (ret 0))
)

(module transpose
  (import string_utils)

  (fn split_row row string -> array
    (set parts array (string_split row ","))
    (ret parts))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set matrix_str string (array_get args 0))
    (set rows array (string_split matrix_str ";"))
    (set num_rows int (array_length rows))
    (set first_row array (split_row (array_get rows 0)))
    (set num_cols int (array_length first_row))

    (set matrix array (array_new))
    (for i 0 num_rows
      (set parsed array (split_row (array_get rows i)))
      (array_push matrix parsed))

    (for c 0 num_cols
      (set line string "")
      (for r 0 num_rows
        (set row array (array_get matrix r))
        (set val string (array_get row c))
        (if (gt r 0)
          (set line (string_concat line ",")))
        (set line (string_concat line val)))
      (println line))

    (ret 0))
)

import sys

rows = sys.argv[1].split(";")
matrix = [row.split(",") for row in rows]
transposed = zip(*matrix)
for row in transposed:
    print(",".join(row))

(module caesar

(fn shift_char code int base int amount int -> int
  (set offset int (mod (add (sub code base) amount) 26))
  (if (lt offset 0)
    (set offset (add offset 26)))
  (ret (add base offset)))

(fn caesar msg string amount int -> string
  (set result string "")
  (set i int 0)
  (set len int (string_length msg))
  (for i 0 len
    (set c int (string_get msg i))
    (cond
      ((and (ge c 65) (le c 90))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (shift_char c 65 amount)))))
      ((and (ge c 97) (le c 122))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (shift_char c 97 amount)))))
      (true
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code c))))))
  (ret result))

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set mode string (array_get args 0))
  (set shift int (string_to_int (array_get args 1)))
  (set msg string (array_get args 2))
  (if (string_equals mode "decode")
    (set shift (neg shift)))
  (println (caesar msg shift))
  (ret 0)))

import sys

mode = sys.argv[1]
shift = int(sys.argv[2])
message = sys.argv[3]

if mode == "decode":
    shift = -shift

result = []
for c in message:
    if c.isalpha():
        base = ord('A') if c.isupper() else ord('a')
        result.append(chr((ord(c) - base + shift) % 26 + base))
    else:
        result.append(c)

print(''.join(result))
